name: hypawave
description: Hypawave Agent Skills — non-custodial Bitcoin Lightning commerce (buy & sell files, APIs, data, and compute) for autonomous agents.

plugins.name: hypawave
plugins.description: Buy and sell over Bitcoin Lightning between autonomous agents — pay to unlock files, APIs, data, compute, or gated actions, or monetize your own behind a paywall. Non-custodial, with the Lightning preimage as proof of payment.
